title: archboldiodendron calosericeum subsp. merrillianum

It is a type of flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, with traditional uses including its application in treating fever, headache, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
